The geocache detail screen: header, coordinates and distance, section rows, and the pinned Log Geocache and navigate buttons.
The detail screen's options menu with Refresh, Log a trackable, Highlight, Add Waypoint, Share, Export GPX and more.
Attaching a photo to a personal note with the + button; images are stored in iCloud and sync across your devices.
The Corrected Coordinates editor with the Is Corrected toggle, DDM picker, presets and coordinate tools.
The Additional Information screen listing found dates, county, elevation, status flags, type and date hidden.
The Create Offline Geocache editor with details, description and a DDM coordinate picker.
